Description: Required. Root element of the fields related to the competition

attributes.Description: Required. Unique ID (UUID) of the competition
Optional. Unique Opta Core competition ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta Core legacy ID; the attribute is not present otherwise. Empty string if no such value exists.
Optional. Unique Opta competition ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta legacy ID; the attribute is not present otherwise. Empty string if no such value exists.
Required. The name of the competition
Required. The known name of the competition
Oprional. The name of the sponsor of a competition
Required. The short three-digit competition code
Required. The format of the competition - one of the following values: Domestic league | Domestic cup | Domestic super cup | International cup | International super cup
